shortDescription.default: View and act on your Microsoft 365 approvals directly from Copilot chat.

longDescription.default: MyApprovals brings your pending Microsoft 365 approval requests into Microsoft 365 Copilot. Ask the MyApprovals agent about your approvals and it displays them inline or in a fullscreen overview, showing the requester, status, and details for each item. Approve, reject, or re-assign a request, and contact the requester by email, all without leaving the conversation.

features.title: copilot-my-approvals Feature
features.description: The feature that activates elements of the copilot-my-approvals solution.
